user.title: Strom Oberbüren — Sign in
user.description: Enter the URL and your credentials. The default is strom.oberbueren.ch — only change the URL if your utility runs the same software on a different domain.

meter.title: Meter
meter.description: Find these values in the URL of the Lastgangdaten page (parameters `objektId` and `meteringcode`).

reconfigure.title: Edit settings
reconfigure.description: You can change the URL, credentials, meter IDs and display name. The credentials will be re-validated against the URL when you save.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the site.

abort.already_configured: This meter has already been configured.

init.title: Poll times
init.description: Pick one or more times of day at which yesterday's data is fetched. Multiple slots act as automatic retries in case the server hasn't published the data yet or returns an error on the first attempt.

backfill.name: Backfill load curve
backfill.description: Imports a date range of historical load-curve data as long-term statistics.

end_date.name: End date
end_date.description: Last day (inclusive). Defaults to start date.

recompute_costs.name: Recompute costs
recompute_costs.description: Rebuilds the cost statistics from existing kWh data (no API calls). Use after editing the tariff file or first enabling the cost feature.
